hooks.command: bash -c 'echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qiwE "(INSERT|UPDATE|DELETE|DROP|TRUNCATE|ALTER)" && echo "DENY: SQL write operations not allowed" && exit 1 || exit 0'
bash -c 'echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE "git\s+merge" && echo "DENY: git merge is not allowed. Use PRs for merging branches." && exit 1 || exit 0'
bash -c 'echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qiE "deploy.*(prod|production)|deploy-all|192\.210\.255" && echo "DENY: Production deployments not allowed. Deploy manually." && exit 1 || exit 0'
bash -c 'echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE "ssh\s+-[fNL]|StrictHostKeyChecking" && echo "DENY: SSH tunnel creation not allowed. Configure tunnels manually." && exit 1 || exit 0'
bash -c 'echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE "git\s+push.*(--force|-f)" && echo "DENY: Force push not allowed. Use regular push or create a PR." && exit 1 || exit 0'
bash -c 'echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qiE "db:restore|restore-database|psql.*<" && echo "DENY: Database restore not allowed. Restore databases manually." && exit 1 || exit 0'

bash -c 'echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qiE "(db:migrate|drizzle.*(push|migrate)).*(prod|production)" && echo "DENY: Production migrations not allowed. Run migrations manually." && exit 1 || exit 0'
bash -c 'echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qiE "setval|ALTER\s+SEQUENCE.*RESTART" && echo "DENY: Sequence manipulation not allowed. Modify sequences manually." && exit 1 || exit 0'
